utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Ah , no ... no ... no just Ross . Ross and Joey is embarrassing enough .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Uh actually , sorry I can not even make it . I am seeing Mona again tonight .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I understand : who would cancel an actual date to go to a fake bachelor party ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I am sorry I gotta cancel tonight baby
